heading: Civil money penalties
label: 4636 Civil money penalties

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Director may impose a civil money penalty in accordance with this section on any regulated entity or any entity-affiliated party. The Director shall not impose a civil penalty in accordance with this section on any regulated entity or any entity-affiliated party for any violation that is addressed under .section 4585(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: violates any provision of this chapter, the authorizing statutes, or any order, condition, rule, or regulation under this chapter or any authorizing statute;

children.label: B
children.text: violates any final or temporary order or notice issued pursuant to this chapter;

children.label: C
children.text: violates any condition imposed in writing by the Director in connection with the grant of any application or other request by such regulated entity; or

children.label: D
children.text: violates any written agreement between the regulated entity and the Director.

children.label: i
children.text: commits any violation described in any subparagraph of paragraph (1);

children.label: ii
children.text: recklessly engages in an unsafe or unsound practice in conducting the affairs of the regulated entity; or

children.label: iii
children.text: breaches any fiduciary duty; and

children.label: i
children.text: is part of a pattern of misconduct;

children.label: ii
children.text: causes or is likely to cause more than a minimal loss to the regulated entity; or

children.label: iii
children.text: results in pecuniary gain or other benefit to such party.

children.label: i
children.text: commits any violation described in any subparagraph of paragraph (1);

children.label: ii
children.text: engages in any unsafe or unsound practice in conducting the affairs of the regulated entity; or

children.label: iii
children.text: breaches any fiduciary duty; and

children.label: B
children.text: knowingly or recklessly causes a substantial loss to the regulated entity or a substantial pecuniary gain or other benefit to such party by reason of such violation, practice, or breach.

children.heading: Maximum amounts of penalties for any violation described in paragraph (3)
children.label: 4 Maximum amounts of penalties for any violation described in paragraph (3)
A
children.text: in the case of any entity-affiliated party, an amount not to exceed $2,000,000; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of any regulated entity, $2,000,000.

children.label: A
children.text: shall provide for the Director to notify the regulated entity or entity-affiliated party in writing of the Director’s determination to impose the penalty, which shall be made on the record;

children.label: B
children.text: shall provide for the imposition of a penalty only after the regulated entity, executive officer, or director or entity-affiliated party has been given an opportunity for a hearing on the record pursuant to ; andsection 4633 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: may provide for review by the Director of any determination or order, or interlocutory ruling, arising from a hearing.

children.heading: Factors in determining amount of penalty
children.label: 2 Factors in determining amount of penalty
children.text: In determining the amount of a penalty under this section, the Director shall give consideration to such factors as the gravity of the violation, any history of prior violations, the effect of the penalty on the safety and soundness of the regulated entity, any injury to the public, any benefits received, and deterrence of future violations, and any other factors the Director may determine by regulation to be appropriate.

children.heading: Review of imposition of penalty
children.label: 3 Review of imposition of penalty
children.text: The order of the Director imposing a penalty under this section shall not be subject to review, except as provided in .section 4634 of this title

children.heading: Action to collect penalty
children.label: d Action to collect penalty
children.text: If a regulated entity, executive officer, director, or entity-affiliated party fails to comply with an order of the Director imposing a civil money penalty under this section, after the order is no longer subject to review as provided under subsection (c)(1), the Director may bring an action in the United States District Court for the District of Columbia, or the United States district court within the jurisdiction of which the headquarters of the regulated entity is located, to obtain a monetary judgment against the regulated entity, executive officer, director, or entity-affiliated party and such other relief as may be available. The monetary judgment may, in the discretion of the court, include any attorneys fees and other expenses incurred by the United States in connection with the action. In an action under this subsection, the validity and appropriateness of the order of the Director imposing the penalty shall not be subject to review.

children.heading: Settlement by Director
children.label: e Settlement by Director
children.text: The Director may compromise, modify, or remit any civil money penalty which may be, or has been, imposed under this section.

children.heading: Availability of other remedies
children.label: f Availability of other remedies
children.text: Any civil money penalty under this section shall be in addition to any other available civil remedy and may be imposed whether or not the Director imposes other administrative sanctions.

children.heading: Prohibition of reimbursement or indemnification
children.label: g Prohibition of reimbursement or indemnification
children.text: A regulated entity may not reimburse or indemnify any individual for any penalty imposed under subsection (b)(3).

children.heading: Deposit of penalties
children.label: h Deposit of penalties
children.text: The Director shall deposit any civil money penalties collected under this section into the general fund of the Treasury.

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: i Applicability
children.text: A penalty under this section may be imposed only for conduct or violations under subsection (a) occurring after .October 28, 1992
